image_upload.error_invalid_type: Invalid file type. Please select an image file (jpg, png, gif).
image_upload.error_too_large: File is too large. Please select an image smaller than {maxSize}MB.
image_upload.error_generic: An error occurred while uploading the image. Please try again.

about.title: About
about.content-p1: Created in 2025, eHub is a sport event management platform created to easy your event execution. Here you can manage informations, payments and registrations faster and simple.
about.content-p2: Only want to participate? Here you can register a account and find many events to participate in many categories.
about.content-p3: We are always open to hear your suggestions and feedbacks. Contact us!

entrance.title: Make it Happen!
entrance.subtitle: With eHub, your events can be created and managed faster and easily.

create.title: Don't find one?
create.subtitle: Search or create your own event now!

create.title: Cool! Thanks for choose us to manage {org_name}!
create.subtitle: After creating your organization in our platform, you will be able to create events!

form.org_identifier: A unique identifier for your organization (like a username)
form.org_description: A small description about your organization (180 characters max)
form.org_submit: Send data to create your organization at eHub

tips.image: Tip: A organization logo is optional, but we recommend you to use square image (1:1 aspect ratio) and a resolution of 500px or more
